scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python require_py310.py && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && ./.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
